heading: Gifts and inheritances
label: 102 Gifts and inheritances
notes: Effective Date of 1986 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to prizes and awards granted after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–514section 151(c) of Pub. L. 99–514section 1 of this titleDec. 31, 1986
amendments: Effective Date of 1986 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to prizes and awards granted after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–514section 151(c) of Pub. L. 99–514section 1 of this titleDec. 31, 1986

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Gross income does not include the value of property acquired by gift, bequest, devise, or inheritance.
the income from any property referred to in subsection (a); or
where the gift, bequest, devise, or inheritance is of income from property, the amount of such income.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not exclude from gross income any amount transferred by or for an employer to, or for the benefit of, an employee.

children.heading: Cross references
children.label: 2 Cross references
children.text: For provisions excluding certain employee achievement awards from gross income, see section 74(c).For provisions excluding certain de minimis fringes from gross income, see section 132(e).
